Deputy City Clerk
City of Santa Cruz

Santa Cruz,CA 95060
Re: Your Request for Advice
Our FiIe No. A-05-109
Dear Ms. Brewer:
This letter is in response to your request on behalf of the City of Santa Cruz for
advice regarding campaign provisions of the political Reform Act (the ..Act,).I
QUESTTON
May committees involved in a ballot measure election to be held on
August 30,2005, combine the semi-annual statement with the first pre-election statement
due on July2l,2005?
CONCLUSION
In connection with an August 3A,2A05 ballot measure election, committees may
use a filing schedule that combines the semi-annual campaign statement with the first
pre-election statement due on July2l,2A05.
I Government Code sections 81000 - gl0l4. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections
18109-18997, ofthe Califomia Code of Regulations.
I


t
FileNo. A-05-109
Page No.2
ANALYSIS
During an election, candidates and committees involved in the election are
required to file two campaign statements disclosing contributions received and
expenditures made in oonnection with that election. These pre-election campaign
statements are generally filed 40 days beforethe election and again 12 daysbefore the
election. (Section 84200.8.) Semi-annual statements are filed January 3 I and July 31,
respectively. (Section U200.)
There is a mechanism in the Act that permits the combining of stateme,lrts when
an overlapping re,porting period occurs, or the filing of the semi-annual statement would
be an additional, unnecessary filing to the two pre-election statements. (Section 54205.)
In this case, filing the two pre-election staternents in connection with an August 3A,2005,
election will satisff the semi-annual filing requirement.
A campaign statement filing schedule which outlines the due dates for filing
statements in connection with the election is enclosed for your convenience.
If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916)
322-5660.
Sincerely,
Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel
By: Trish Mayer
Political Reform Consultant
Technical Assistance Division
Enclosure
